productDisplayName: DC Comics Men Green Lantern Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black T-shirt , made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Warm iron; do not iron on decorations If you're a fan of comics and the Green Lantern, this T-shirt is the perfect choice. The vibrant colour and graphics transport you to your childhood fantasies, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Pair this with jeans or shorts.
